title: ShruggieTech Credentials Manifest
description: Metadata-only catalog of credentials required by a ShruggieTech project. This schema deliberately prohibits storage of credential values. Values live exclusively in their target systems (Vercel env vars, Cloudflare token storage, GitHub Actions secrets, operator password manager) and are referenced by this manifest, never embedded in it.

$schema.description: URI of this schema, for IDE validation and tooling.

name.description: Project name as known within ShruggieTech.

last_reviewed.description: Date of last manifest review in YYYY-MM-DD format.

id.description: Canonical identifier for the credential, typically the env var name. Screaming snake case.

purpose.description: One-sentence description of what this credential authorizes or enables.

format.description: Human-readable description of the credential's expected format. Never a sample value.

scope.description: For tokens with scope limitations, the exact scopes granted.

sensitive_class.description: public: safe to display in logs or dashboards (e.g., OAuth client IDs). secret: must not appear in logs, may exist on trusted disks. highly-sensitive: root credentials, API master keys, account-level tokens; treat with extra care.

rotation.description: Procedure for rotating this credential, including propagation steps to every location listed in lives_in.

notes.description: Free-form notes on quirks, gotchas, or cross-references.

service.description: Human-readable name of the provisioning service (e.g., 'Google Cloud Console', 'Cloudflare', 'Vercel integration: Neon').

identifier.description: Provider-side identifier (e.g., GCP project ID, Cloudflare zone name, Neon project slug).

console_url.description: Direct link to the credential's management console.

sensitive_toggle.description: Vercel's Sensitive toggle state. 'on' blocks the development environment; 'off' permits all three.

auto_injected.description: True if a Vercel integration provisioned this variable automatically.

environment.description: Optional GitHub Actions environment name if scoped.

persistence.description: user: persistent per-user (Windows User env, ~/.bashrc, etc.). system: persistent machine-wide. session: ephemeral, lost on shell close. Sprint scripts should never depend on 'session'.

gitignored.description: MUST be true for any local file containing credential values. Enforced by CI.
